title: RemappingRecipe
description:
Combine input images and produce a single categorical `class` band by assigning each pixel to the target class whose constraint expression it satisfies. Constraints can reference any band of any input.

Use for: reclassifying a land-cover map, deriving categorical from continuous (forest/non-forest from canopy cover), fusing multiple layers into one class label.

Pipeline: (1) load `inputImagery.images`, select `includedBands`; (2) for each `legend.entries[i]` build a per-pixel mask from `constraints` joined by `booleanOperator`; (3) mosaic in REVERSED order — `ee.mosaic` lets earlier entries override later ones, but the recipe reverses first so **later entries in the source order win**; (4) pixels matching no entry are masked out.

AOI = geometry of `inputImagery.images[0]`.

**`constraint.image` differs from indexChange**: here it's the input's `imageId` (not literal `'this-recipe'`).

inputImagery.title: RemappingInputImagery
inputImagery.description: Source images. Constraints reference them via `imageId`.

inputImage.title: RemappingInputImage
inputImage.description: Single source image. `imageId` is the join key used by `legend.entries[*].constraints[*].image`.

imageId.description: UUID. Constraints reference this image by it.

type.description: `RECIPE_REF` = SEPAL recipe id; `ASSET` = EE asset id.

id.description: Recipe id or EE asset id (per `type`).

bands.description: Per-band metadata keyed by band name. Categorical entry: `{values, labels, palette}`; continuous entry: `{}`. Build via `image_bands({type, id})` for the names + `image_visualizations({type, id, band})` per band (returns `values`/`labels`/`palette` for categorical, nothing for continuous). Used by the Mapping panel to know which source bands have categorical legends + class values.

visualizations.description: Optional. Source's preset visualizations. Use `image_visualizations({type, id})` (no `band` filter) to populate; GUI refetches on form open if absent.

includedBands.description: Bands available to constraint expressions. Must include every band any constraint references.

type.description: `categorical` = limited integer values, use with `class` operator. `continuous` = numeric, use with `<`/`≤`/`>`/`≥`/`=`/`range`.

legendEntries.description: Source band's legend (mirrors source classification's classes). Required when `type='categorical'` — used for the `class` constraint's class-picker. Build by calling `image_visualizations({type, id, band})` and zipping the returned `values`/`labels`/`palette` arrays into entries `{value, label, color}` (one per index). Empty/absent for continuous.

legend.title: RemappingLegend
legend.description: Target classes with constraint expressions for pixel assignment.

id.description: UUID. Path key when Mapping panel updates the entry's constraints.

value.description: Class value in `class` output band. Unique across entries.

booleanOperator.description: Combine `constraints`. `and` = all required (`sum().eq(constraints.size())`); `or` = any (max of masks). Ignored when 0 or 1 constraint; required when ≥2.

constraints.description: Constraint expression for this class. Empty array masks the whole image for this class — usually not what you want (yields a class with no pixels).

constraint.title: RemappingConstraint
constraint.description:
Single comparison on a band of one input image. Shape varies by operator:
- `class` — categorical match; pixel matches if band ∈ `selectedClasses`.
- `range` — `from`/`to` with `fromInclusive`/`toInclusive`.
- `<`/`≤`/`>`/`≥`/`=` — against `value`.

`≤`/`≥` are unicode U+2264/U+2265 (NOT `<=`/`>=`).

description.description: GUI summary; not read by backend.

image.description: `imageId` of an `inputImagery.images` entry. NOT `'this-recipe'` (that's indexChange, not remapping).

band.description: Band name on the referenced image. Must appear in that image's `includedBands`.

operator.description: `class` for categorical; rest for continuous. `≤`/`≥` = U+2264/U+2265.

selectedClasses.description: Class values to match. Required for `class`. Pixel matches if band value is any. Reference values from the band's `legendEntries`.

allOf.description: Range operator requires from, to, fromInclusive, toInclusive.
